title: Smoky Russian Millet Bowl
description: A hearty and flavorful bowl filled with smoky millet, grilled vegetables, and a hint of Russian spices.

ingredients.name: Grill seasonings
ingredients.notes: mix of salt, pepper, and garlic powder

instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan over medium-high heat.
Grill the red onion and bell pepper for 5-7 minutes per side, or until tender.
In a medium saucepan, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium heat.
Add the millet and cook for 5 minutes, stirring frequently.
Add the smoked paprika, grill seasonings, salt, and pepper to the millet.
Stir well to combine and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Spoon the millet mixture into a bowl and top with grilled vegetables, Russian pickles, and a drizzle of olive oil.
